filters.purpose: Separate nonlinear associations from unresolved ambiguity.
filters.falsifier: If metaphors cannot be translated into an operational instruction, keep as notes only.

filters.purpose: Detect attention capture, novelty loops and dopamine-shaped distraction.
filters.falsifier: If entertainment content changes the technical decision, isolate it.

filters.purpose: Detect propaganda, coercive framing, tribal labels and engagement bait.
filters.falsifier: If a source urges action without evidence, demote it to manipulation risk.

filters.purpose: Detect stale data, revision lag, schema drift and mismatch in frequency.
filters.falsifier: If timestamp, capture date or version is missing, require snapshot review.

filters.purpose: Score provenance, license, coverage, stability and reproducibility.
filters.falsifier: If source card or terms are missing, integration cannot be approved.

filters.purpose: Detect conflicting requirements or incompatible claims.
filters.falsifier: If a critical contradiction remains unresolved, block execution.

filters.purpose: Detect secrets, PII, private material, legal/political risk and unsafe domains.
filters.falsifier: Any credential, PII, private RPG/TCG or electoral prediction request blocks.

filters.purpose: Detect overfit, leakage, bad calibration and invalid causal interpretation.
filters.falsifier: If backtest is worse than baseline or leakage is detected, block production.

filters.purpose: Preserve useful user cognitive style without letting it override facts.
filters.falsifier: If style changes technical content, lower beta or remove adaptation.

filters.purpose: Transform mixed context into clear instructions, schemas and tests for agents.
filters.falsifier: If an agent cannot identify inputs, outputs and gates, require handoff repair.
